title: vitis × gallica
intro: Vitis × gallica, also known as the Vitis gallica or French vine, is a hybrid species of grapevine that is native to Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Vitis × gallica include reducing blood pressure, improving blood lipid profiles, and preventing cell damage, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for heart health and antioxidant support. Vitis × gallica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
